docs.title: Welcome to the Project Hub
docs.text:
Project Goal

This is a centralised platform for my team to look into the sources, info that I want to share with them.

docs.title: Hello
docs.text: Select your name from the sidebar to view your specific tasks, or check the shared resources for project guidelines.
